testcase.name: addDraftCase

failure.message: The following asserts failed: Basic Info page did NOT open! expected [Basic Information] but found [null]

testcase.name: submitDraftAndVerifyName

failure.message: The following asserts failed: Basic Info page did NOT open! expected [Basic Information] but found [null], Recently Submitted case name not visible! expected [VISIBLE] but found [NOT_VISIBLE]
